title: Auction of Government of India Dated Security
description: Government of India (GoI) has announced the sale (issue) of one dated security for a notified amount of ₹34,000 crore as per the following details: Sr No Security Date of Repayment Notified Amount (₹ Crore) GoI specific Notification Auction Date Settlement Date 1 New GS 2036 May 11, 2036 34,000 F.No.4(1)-B(W&M)/2026 dated May 04, 2026 May 08, 2026 (Friday) May 11, 2026 (Monday)   Total   34,000       2.
